title: Union Bank of India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Union Bank of India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Union Bank of India! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Union Bank of India:
Union Bank of India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
